SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of October 1, 2023, by and among:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S7654321B, residing at 123 Orchid Road, #05-67, Singapore 456789, with email contact: emily.tan@fictivecorp.sg and phone: +65 9123 4567.

2. Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S8765432C, residing at 456 Jasmine Avenue, #12-34, Singapore 567890, with email contact: john.lim@imaginaryventures.sg and phone: +65 9876 5432.

3. Prosperity Holdings Pte Ltd, UEN: 201512345D, having its registered office at 789 Rose Lane, Singapore 678901, with email contact: info@prosperityholdings.sg and phone: +65 6789 0123.

WHEREAS, the parties hereto wish to set forth their agreement regarding their respective rights and obligations as shareholders of Quantum Innovations Ltd (UEN: T21LL3456A).

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements contained herein, the parties agree to contribute a total of SGD 500,000 towards the capital of Quantum Innovations Ltd.
